description_long: This object is a tall, transparent glass tumbler filled nearly to the brim with a thick, chocolate-brown milkshake. The milkshake has a smooth, slightly glossy surface, indicating a creamy texture, and there are no visible toppings or decorations on top. A straight, gray straw is inserted into the drink, protruding from the center and leaning slightly in some views. The glass is cylindrical with a flat base and clear sides, allowing the rich color of the milkshake to be seen from all angles. There is no visible branding, logo, or text on the glass or straw. The overall appearance is clean and simple, suitable for a casual urban café or takeout setting.
description: A tall, clear glass tumbler filled with a chocolate milkshake and a gray straw, with no visible toppings or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass tumbler filled with chocolate milkshake and a straight gray straw centered in the drink.
description_view_1: Side view with the straw leaning diagonally to the left, revealing the smooth milkshake surface and clear glass.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the straw appearing straight and the milkshake surface visible.
description_view_3: Side view with the straw leaning diagonally to the right, showing the same smooth milkshake and clear tumbler.
